title: ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Jumbo Tweezer Set Serrated Tips Secure Grip - 3pc
description:
The ToolTreaux 3pc large tweezer set comes with 3 different sizes of oversize tweezers - 8”, 10”, and 12” in length. These jumbo-sized tweezers are great for grabbing hard-to-reach items and offer a more sturdy grip than traditional small tweezers. Each tweezer features a serrated tip with a tapered blunt designed to securely hold on to tiny objects. You can count on them to grip and place small items during hobby and crafting projects like jewelry making, metalworking, and woodworking. These tweezers have a non-slip grip that allows for a comfortable, tight pinch. The strong grip will ensure that you can hold on to stubborn objects that smaller tweezers aren’t strong enough to hold onto

ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Jumbo Tweezer Set Serrated Tips Secure Grip - 3pc

The ToolTreaux 3pc large tweezer set comes with 3 different sizes of oversize tweezers - 8”, 10”, and 12” in length. These jumbo-sized tweezers are great for grabbing hard-to-reach items and offer a more sturdy grip than traditional small tweezers.

Key Features

  • SERRATED TIPS - ToolTreaux 3pc tweezer set features serrated tips with a tapered blunt designed to hold on to hard-to-grab objects. Use them to securely grip and place tiny items used during hobby and craft projects
  • KNURLED SECURE GRIP - Each tweezer has a non-slip grip that allows for comfortable and tight pinching, ideal for small items. Strong grip helps hold onto stubborn objects
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Tweezers are made of high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust. Entire set weighs less than half a pound, will fit inside most standard toolboxes and craft storage containers
  • OVERSIZE TWEEZERS - 3pc set of tweezers comes in 3 different jumbo sizes: 8”, 10”, and 12” length. Jumbo tweezers are great for grabbing hard to reach objects and are more sturdy than traditional-sized tweezers
  • VERSATILE PRECISION TOOLS - Large tweezers are ideal for picking up and positioning objects like stones and gems during jewelry making, but they’ll also come in handy for general use purposes like working on electronics, medical and lab work, woodworking, and other fine crafts

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 3PCJTWEZSET
  • UPC: 810058486493
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 14 in x 4 in x 0.25 in

Each tweezer features a serrated tip with a tapered blunt designed to securely hold on to tiny objects. You can count on them to grip and place small items during hobby and crafting projects like jewelry making, metalworking, and woodworking.

These tweezers have a non-slip grip that allows for a comfortable, tight pinch. The strong grip will ensure that you can hold on to stubborn objects that smaller tweezers aren’t strong enough to hold onto. They are made of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, and will fit inside most standard toolboxes and craft storage containers.
